hero.subtitle: Your trusted source for authentic Indonesian food products in Taiwan. From beloved snacks to essential cooking ingredients, we bring the taste of home to you.

about.title: About Mahkota Taiwan
about.description: Mahkota Taiwan is Taiwan's leading Indonesian food distributor, proudly bridging Indonesian culture and Taiwanese daily life since 2021. With 26+ carefully curated product lines spanning instant noodles, snacks, cooking spices, beverages, and household essentials, we serve over 1 million customers through 300+ partner stores island-wide. All our products are Halal certified, ensuring the highest standards of quality and trust. Backed by a reliable supply chain and comprehensive logistics network, we are more than just a distributor — we are a cultural ambassador, bringing the authentic taste of home to every Indonesian community in Taiwan and beyond.
about.mission: Our mission is to bridge cultures through food, providing high-quality Indonesian products with reliable distribution across Taiwan.
